creator: gerald@pfeifer.com
text:
On Sun, 4 Feb 2007, Pav Lucistnik wrote:
> Looks like a rewording to me, no new information actually added, except
> of what USE_LDCONFIG=yes do.

Not too much new information has been added indeed.  I do, however, 
believe that the new version is much more helpful for someone not
already familiar with the code/the options in questions.

At least this was the case for me, who had to reverse-engineer this code, 
something which I would not have had to do with the updated documentation.

Which is why I took the time trying to improve it. :-)

Gerald
